overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a motorcycle ride through a futuristic neon-lit city. The journey begins in an underground tunnel, emerges into bright daylight among skyscrapers, and navigates through varying lighting conditions from sunlit boulevards to shadowed canyons and neon-drenched commercial districts.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground service tunnel with concrete pillars

events.description: approaching tunnel exit with bright daylight visible ahead

agents.ego_description: riding a red motorcycle through an underground concrete tunnel, heading toward the bright exit

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the tunnel ceiling, repeating pattern
long fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling providing artificial illumination
orange textured wall panels on the right side of the tunnel
bright white light visible at the end of the tunnel indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person motorcycle ride through an underground concrete tunnel. Fluorescent lights illuminate the gray concrete pillars and walls as the rider approaches a bright exit at the far end. The environment is enclosed and artificially lit with no other vehicles or pedestrians present.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city boulevard with skyscrapers and elevated highways

events.description: exiting dark tunnel into bright midday sunlight causing momentary exposure adjustment
accelerating and weaving between futuristic vehicles on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: accelerating out of the tunnel and navigating through moderate traffic on a wide city boulevard lined with palm trees

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving ahead in the same lane
dark colored coupe passing on the left side

entered.detail: tall modern glass and steel skyscrapers with reflective facades dominating the skyline
curved elevated highway ramp structure with orange support beams
tall palm trees lining the right side of the boulevard
large floating holographic advertisements displaying colorful imagery

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle bursts out of the tunnel into bright daylight on a wide futuristic boulevard. Glass skyscrapers rise in the distance while palm trees and elevated highway ramps line the street. The rider accelerates and weaves through moderate traffic including futuristic sedans and coupes.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban canyon between towering skyscrapers with digital signage

events.description: entering deep shadow between tall buildings as the street becomes a canyon
overtaking a white sports car on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: cruising through a narrow street canyon lined with towering buildings and giant digital billboards, overtaking slower vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sports car being overtaken on the left side
green sports car driving ahead in the distance

entered.detail: tall building facades forming canyon walls on both sides of the street
enclosed pedestrian walkways connecting buildings high above the street
giant vertical digital screens displaying advertisements on building faces

segments.scene_description: The street narrows into an urban canyon with towering buildings blocking most of the sky. The lighting shifts to mixed shadow with artificial neon accents. The rider overtakes a white sports car while massive digital billboards and overhead pedestrian bridges dominate the vertical space.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with intense green neon lighting and metal structures

events.description: entering area dominated by green neon strip lights along the left building facade
turning right at an intersection with a yellow striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: navigating a darker industrial section illuminated by vibrant green neon lights, then turning right at an intersection

notable_agents.action: black car crossing the intersection from the right

entered.detail: horizontal strips of bright green neon lighting running along the building facade
exposed metal beams and industrial piping on building exteriors
dark red industrial building walls with minimal windows

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a darker, more industrial street section characterized by intense green neon lighting on the left and red industrial buildings on the right. The rider navigates through this artificially lit canyon before making a right turn at an intersection where a black car crosses from the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: vibrant commercial district with colorful neon storefronts and pedestrian activity

events.description: transitioning from green neon to warm yellow, orange and red neon lighting
crossing a yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk at an intersection

agents.ego_description: cruising through a brightly lit commercial district with vivid neon signs and pedestrians visible on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near brightly lit storefronts

entered.detail: commercial buildings with bright yellow neon lighting and signage at street level
vivid red neon signs and building accents illuminating the right side
large holographic advertisements displaying vibrant pink and blue imagery

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a vibrant commercial area bathed in warm yellow, orange, and red neon light. The street features colorful holographic advertisements and active pedestrian walkways. The rider crosses a yellow striped intersection while passing neon-lit storefronts and palm trees lining the boulevard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle ride that transitions from a sterile underground tunnel into a sprawling, neon-accented futuristic metropolis. It begins within an enclosed concrete corridor illuminated by fluorescent lights, moving steadily toward a bright opening at the far end. As the rider bursts out of the tunnel, the environment suddenly expands into a wide, sunlit boulevard lined with palm trees and glass skyscrapers under a clear sky. The scene then shifts as the road narrows into a dense urban canyon, where the bright daylight gives way to deep shadows and the glow of massive digital billboards. Finally, the camera weaves through traffic and under overhead pedestrian bridges, overtaking a white sports car amidst the towering verticality of the city.

The shot follows a continuous motorcycle ride that transitions from a moody industrial corridor into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins by navigating a dark street defined by a sharp contrast between intense green neon lighting on the left and red industrial buildings on the right. As the rider reaches an intersection and makes a right turn, dodging a crossing black car, the oppressive industrial atmosphere gives way to a brighter environment. The scene then expands into a lively boulevard bathed in warm yellow, orange, and red tones, where holographic advertisements and palm trees line the route. Finally, the camera glides across a yellow striped intersection, passing a series of glowing storefronts and active pedestrian walkways.
